mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.brand, p.status, p.stock_quantity, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at, c.name AS category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.brand, p.status, p.stock_quantity, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at, c.name AS category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
